author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Delivered:
1. Added GpuBackend::conv2d_f32() trait method + CudaBackendImpl wiring to gpu_conv2d_f32
2. Conv2d::forward now dispatches to GPU for f32 CUDA tensors — im2col + GEMM + bias entirely on-device
3. Backward still uses CPU path (stores im2col cols from a CPU recompute), but forward is fully GPU
4. Full GPU backward (recomputing im2col on GPU) deferred — would require the backward to also call gpu_conv2d infrastructure

This eliminates the CPU roundtrip for the forward pass. Backward is the next optimization target.
46 conv + 6 integration tests pass.
